title: Develop a management plan for a designated area
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a management plan for a designated area demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define the need for a management plan

pcs.text: Identify management plan objectives for the designated area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify management plan objectives for the designated area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify management plan objectives for the designated area.

pcs.text: Consult with client to achieve agreement on brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to achieve agreement on brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to achieve agreement on brief.

pcs.text: Identify planning team, specialists and consultants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify planning team, specialists and consultants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify planning team, specialists and consultants.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Define the need for a management plan

elements.title: Undertake preliminary planning activities

pcs.text: Identify stakeholders impacted by management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify stakeholders impacted by management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify stakeholders impacted by management plan.

pcs.text: Identify legislative and regulatory impacts on designated area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legislative and regulatory impacts on designated area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legislative and regulatory impacts on designated area.

pcs.text: Ascertain availability of specialists to assist in management planning work and preparation of contracts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ascertain availability of specialists to assist in management planning work and preparation of contracts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ascertain availability of specialists to assist in management planning work and preparation of contracts.

pcs.text: Establish timelines for development of the management plan and reporting arrangements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish timelines for development of the management plan and reporting arrangements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish timelines for development of the management plan and reporting arrangements.

pcs.text: Identify resources required for the development of management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify resources required for the development of management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify resources required for the development of management strategies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake preliminary planning activities

elements.title: Prepare a site description

pcs.text: Identify and map landscape values of designated area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and map landscape values of designated area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and map landscape values of designated area.

pcs.text: Identify and map physical features and characteristics of designated area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and map physical features and characteristics of designated area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and map physical features and characteristics of designated area.

pcs.text: Identify site use and impact on designated area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site use and impact on designated area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site use and impact on designated area.

pcs.text: Assess and document physical condition and civil concepts according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and document physical condition and civil concepts according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and document physical condition and civil concepts according to client brief.

pcs.text: Document biological characteristics and influences on biota
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document biological characteristics and influences on biota?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document biological characteristics and influences on biota.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare a site description

elements.title: Analyse site information and description

pcs.text: Assess site description against core principles and objectives in client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site description against core principles and objectives in client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site description against core principles and objectives in client brief.

pcs.text: Determine priorities and key conservation issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine priorities and key conservation issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine priorities and key conservation issues.

pcs.text: Prepare longitudinal projections of continuing impacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare longitudinal projections of continuing impacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare longitudinal projections of continuing impacts.

pcs.text: Assess performance of site for proposed use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess performance of site for proposed use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess performance of site for proposed use.

pcs.text: Identify and document opportunities and constraints to meeting planning objectives and goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document opportunities and constraints to meeting planning objectives and goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document opportunities and constraints to meeting planning objectives and goals.

pcs.text: Seek stakeholder feedback and amend planning documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek stakeholder feedback and amend planning documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek stakeholder feedback and amend planning documentation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Analyse site information and description

elements.title: Identify management strategies

pcs.text: Identify management options to achieve defined objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify management options to achieve defined objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify management options to achieve defined objectives.

pcs.text: Design management strategies to address defined objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design management strategies to address defined objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design management strategies to address defined objectives.

pcs.text: Cost and compare management strategies against budget and available resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cost and compare management strategies against budget and available resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cost and compare management strategies against budget and available resources.

pcs.text: Plan work scheduling to prioritise outcomes and resource allocation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan work scheduling to prioritise outcomes and resource allocation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan work scheduling to prioritise outcomes and resource allocation.

pcs.text: Consult with stakeholders and incorporate feedback into planning documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with stakeholders and incorporate feedback into planning documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with stakeholders and incorporate feedback into planning documentation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Identify management strategies

elements.title: Prepare the management plan

pcs.text: Consolidate site information and management strategies into draft management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consolidate site information and management strategies into draft management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consolidate site information and management strategies into draft management plan.

pcs.text: Seek feedback from stakeholders and clients and amend draft management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek feedback from stakeholders and clients and amend draft management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek feedback from stakeholders and clients and amend draft management plan.

pcs.text: Prepare and present a final management plan according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and present a final management plan according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and present a final management plan according to client brief.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Prepare the management plan
